commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b1c643c76b94577b73caa34df45898ea066b9507)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a conditional `duration` property to the MiniMax music-generation JSON request body when `durationSeconds` is finite.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established here. Source inspection does reproduce the request-construction gap: `durationSeconds` is only embedded in the prompt and is not included as a structured field on current main.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/contributor contract proof for the undocumented MiniMax duration field; an automated repair should not guess upstream API behavior.
